name: Chen Po-Wen
biography: Chen Po Wen (Chinese: 陳博文; born in 1953) is a Taiwanese film editor. In 1974, he graduated from the Department of Radio and Television of the National Taiwan Junior College of Arts. He first worked as a script clerk and assistant director, before launching a career as a film editor under the guidance of editor Huang Chiu-kuei (黃秋貴). He has won the the Golden Horse Best Film Editing Awards for Do Over (2006) and Darkness and Light (1999).
